name: breadcrumb
description: An accessible breadcrumb navigation trail; nav landmark, ordered list, aria-current='page' on the current item, separator aria-hidden (WAI-ARIA breadcrumb pattern).
docs: Register <lv-breadcrumb> by importing components/ui/breadcrumb.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as an array of { label, href? } from root to current. The last item is marked aria-current='page'. Set `separator` to change the divider glyph (default '/').
